Part.Source: Event Start LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWDUPLICATAS', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) //&UserUpdate.Visible = &Context.Old_Perfil = 3 //btnUserInsert.Visible = &Context.Old_Perfil = 3 &IsCancelado = false /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ UnnamedTable2.Width = 120 UnnamedTable1.Width = 100 &EmpCod.Visible = False Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName DDO_GridColumnsSelector.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &CreFrpPgtoTip1 = nullvalue(&CreFrpPgtoTip1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREDUPNRO' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &CreFrpPgtoTip2 = nullvalue(&CreFrpPgtoTip2) &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREDUPNRO' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &CreFrpPgtoTip3 = nullvalue(&CreFrpPgtoTip3) &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREDUPNRO' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &ExppData = new() &ExppDataItem = new() &ExppDataItem.Title = 'Imprimir Selecionadas' &ExppDataItem.EventKey = !'ImprimirSelecionadas' &ExppDataItem.IsDivider = False &ExppData.Add(&ExppDataItem) &ExppDataItem = new() &ExppDataItem.Title = 'Novo Adiantamento' &ExppDataItem.Link = WPAdiantamentoPedidos.Link('WWDuplicataPagar') &ExppDataItem.IsDivider = False &ExppData.Add(&ExppDataItem) &ExppDataItem = new() &ExppDataItem.Title = '------------' &ExppDataItem.EventKey = !'espaco2' &ExppDataItem.IsDivider = False &ExppData.Add(&ExppDataItem) &ExppDataItem = new() &ExppDataItem.Title = 'Exportar Excel' &ExppDataItem.Icon = ActionExport.Link() &ExppDataItem.EventKey = !'Export' &ExppDataItem.IsDivider = False &ExppData.Add(&ExppDataItem) &ExppDataItem = new() &ExppDataItem.Title = 'Exportar PDF' &ExppDataItem.Icon = ActionExportReport.Link() &ExppDataItem.EventKey = !'ExportReport' &ExppDataItem.IsDivider = False &ExppData.Add(&ExppDataItem) &CreRecPag = nullvalue(&CreRecPag) &CreSts = nullvalue(&CreSts) &auxCreFrpPgtoTip = nullvalue(&auxCreFrpPgtoTip) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Duplicatas' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' &OrderedBy.Clear() &OrderedBy.AddItem(1, 'Vcto. Decresc.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(2, 'Vcto. Cresc.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(3, 'Nro') &OrderedBy.AddItem(4, 'Emissão') &OrderedBy.AddItem(5, 'Vcto.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(6, '1ºPgto') &OrderedBy.AddItem(7, 'Forma') If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &OrderedDsc.Visible = False &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() DDO_GridColumnsSelector.TitleControlIdToReplace = BtnEditColumns.InternalName GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &PesCod = &Context.PesCod EndEvent Event Refresh retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWDUPLICATAS', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) &Hoje = ServerDate() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' If &Session.Get(!'WWDuplicatasColumnsSelector') <> '' &ColumnsSelectorXML = &Session.Get(!'WWDuplicatasColumnsSelector') &ColumnsSelector.FromXml(&ColumnsSelectorXML) Else Do 'InitializeColumnsSelector' EndIf &IsMarcado.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(1).IsVisible &CreNovCliRaz.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(2).IsVisible &CreDupNroWithTags.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(3).IsVisible CreDtaEms.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(4).IsVisible CreDtaVct.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(5).IsVisible CreDtaPrmPag.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(6).IsVisible CreVlrDup.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(7).IsVisible CreVlrSdo.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(8).IsVisible CreVenCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(9).IsVisible CreCbrCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(10).IsVisible CreBloNro.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(11).IsVisible CreFrpPgtoNom.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(12).IsVisible &AuxPedido.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(13).IsVisible &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount &IsMarcado.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &UserUpdate.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWIconActionColumn' &CreNovCliRaz.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &CreDupNroWithTags.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' CreDtaEms.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' CreDtaVct.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' CreDtaPrmPag.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' CreVlrDup.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' CreVlrSdo.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' CreVenCod.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' CreCbrCod.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' CreBloNro.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' CreFrpPgtoNom.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &AuxPedido.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &ActionG.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWActionGroupColumn' &DoImprimir.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWIconActionColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ PadraoUsuario.Call('L', &Pgmname, &Context.PesCod,&Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) If not &PadObs.IsEmpty() &CrePedCod = val(Substr(&PadObs,1,8)) &CreCliCod = Val(Substr(&PadObs,9,8)) &var1 = Substr(&PadObs,17,1) Do Case Case &var1 = '1' &CreRecPag = ReceberPagar.Receber case &var1 = '2' &CreRecPag = ReceberPagar.Pagar OtherWise &CreRecPag.SetEmpty() EndCase &CreCod = Val(Substr(&PadObs,18,8)) &var1 = Substr(&PadObs,26,1) &Status_AbertoFechado = &var1 EndIf EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &UserUpdate = !'' &ActionG.Clear() &ActionG.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') &ActionG.AddItem(1, 'Pagamentos') &ActionG.AddItem(2, 'Adicionar Obs') If (CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DUPLICATA and (CreCbrImp = TipoImpressao.GerarBoleto or (CreCbrImp = TipoImpressao.ImprimirBoleto and CreBloNro <> ''))) &ActionG.AddItem(3, 'Envia E-mail') Endif If (CreSts <> Status_Duplicata.Cancelada) &ActionG.AddItem(4, 'Cancelar') Endif If (CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DUPLICATA and (CreCrbRegAut = Status_SimNao.Sim and CreRecPag = ReceberPagar.Receber and (CreDtaRet.IsEmpty() or CreDtaRet.IsNull()))) &ActionG.AddItem(5, 'Registrar Online') Endif If (CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DUPLICATA and (CreCrbRegAut = Status_SimNao.Sim and CreRecPag = ReceberPagar.Receber and CreBloNro <> '')) &ActionG.AddItem(6, 'Impressão Online') Endif If (CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DUPLICATA and (CreCrbRegAut = Status_SimNao.Sim and CreRecPag = ReceberPagar.Receber and CreCbrCtaBanBanCod <> '237' and CreBloNro <> '')) &ActionG.AddItem(7, 'CMD Instrução Online') Endif &ActionG.AddItem(8, 'Log.Alteração') If (CreRenDstCod > 0) &ActionG.AddItem(9, 'Ver Renegociação') Endif &ActionG.AddItem(10, 'Imprimir A4/Ticket') If (CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DUPLICATA and CreCrbRegAut = Status_SimNao.Sim and CreRecPag = ReceberPagar.Receber and CreCodSol <> '' and CreSts = Status_Duplicata.EM_REMESSA) &ActionG.AddItem(11, 'Recuperar Cobrança') Endif &DoImprimir = !'' if CreNovCliRaz_Formula.Length() > 30 &CreNovCliRaz = substr(CreNovCliRaz_Formula, 1, 30) + '...' Else &CreNovCliRaz = CreNovCliRaz_Formula EndIf if CreAbvDup.IsEmpty() or CreAbvDup.IsNull() AtualizaSaldoDuplicata.Call(EmpCod, CreCod, FilCod) &AuxPedido = CreAbvDup_FORMULA Else &AuxPedido = CreAbvDup Endif If CreSts = Status_Duplicata.Cancelada &IsMarcado.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough WWColumnLineThroughFirstColumn' &UserUpdate.ColumnClass = !'WWIconActionColumn WWColumnLineThrough' &CreNovCliRaz.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough' &CreDupNroWithTags.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough' CreDtaEms.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough hidden-xs' CreDtaVct.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough hidden-xs' CreDtaPrmPag.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough' CreVlrDup.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough hidden-xs' CreVlrSdo.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough hidden-xs' CreVenCod.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough hidden-xs' CreCbrCod.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough hidden-xs' CreBloNro.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough hidden-xs' CreFrpPgtoNom.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough' &AuxPedido.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnLineThrough' &ActionG.ColumnClass = !'WWActionGroupColumn WWColumnLineThrough' &DoImprimir.ColumnClass = !'WWIconActionColumn WWColumnLineThrough' Else &IsMarcado.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &UserUpdate.ColumnClass = 'WWIconActionColumn' &CreNovCliRaz.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &CreDupNroWithTags.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' CreDtaEms.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' CreDtaVct.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' CreDtaPrmPag.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' CreVlrDup.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' CreVlrSdo.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' CreVenCod.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' CreCbrCod.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' CreBloNro.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' CreFrpPgtoNom.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' &AuxPedido.ColumnClass = iif(CreDupNro like '%CREDITO%' or &AuxPedido like '%DV%', !'WWColumn WWColumnInfo WWColumnInfoSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &ActionG.ColumnClass = 'WWActionGroupColumn' &DoImprimir.ColumnClass = 'WWIconActionColumn' Endif &CreDupNroWithTags = CreDupNro If CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DINHEIRO &CreDupNroWithTags = !"" + &CreDupNroWithTags EndIf If CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DUPLICATA &CreDupNroWithTags = !"" + &CreDupNroWithTags EndIf If CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CHEQUET or CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CHEQUEP &CreDupNroWithTags = !"" + &CreDupNroWithTags EndIf If CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CARTAOC or CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CARTAOD &CreDupNroWithTags = !"" + &CreDupNroWithTags EndIf If CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.PIX &CreDupNroWithTags = !"" + &CreDupNroWithTags EndIf If CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DEPOSITO &CreDupNroWithTags = !"" + &CreDupNroWithTags EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Do CAse CAse CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CHEQUET and CreCheCod <> 0 &UserUpdate.Link = wpLancarCheque1.Link('ADD', EmpCod, CreCheCod) CAse CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.CHEQUEP and CreCheCod <> 0 &UserUpdate.Link = wpLancarChequeProprio.Link('ADD', EmpCod, CreCheCod) Otherwise &UserUpdate.Link = addDuplicatas.Link('WWDUPLICATAS', 'UPD', EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod) EndCase &CreDupNroWithTags.Link = verDuplicata.Link('wwDuplicatas', EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod) Do Case Case CreCbrImp = TipoImpressao.GerarBoleto and CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DUPLICATA &DoImprimir.TooltipText = "Imprimir Boleto" Case CreCbrImp = TipoImpressao.ImprimirBoleto and CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DUPLICATA and CreBloNro <> '' &DoImprimir.TooltipText = "Imprimir Boleto" Case CreCbrImp = TipoImpressao.ImprimirDuplicata and CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DUPLICATA &DoImprimir.TooltipText = "Imprimir Duplicata" Case CreCbrImp = TipoImpressao.NaoFazerNada or CreFrpPgtoTip <> TipoDuplicata.DUPLICATA &DoImprimir.TooltipText = "Nada a Fazer" EndCase CreCbrCod.Tooltiptext = CreCbrNom.Trim() CreVenCod.Link = VerCliente.Link('WWDuplicatas', EmpCod,CreVenCod) &AuxPedido.Link = '' Do CAse CAse CrePedCod <> 0 &AuxPedido.Link = VerPedido.Link('WWDuplicatas', EmpCod,FilCod,CrePedCod) Case CreRenDstCod <> 0 &AuxPedido.Link = wpduplicatarenegociada.Link(EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod ) EndCAse IF CreDtaVct < &Hoje and CreVlrSdo > 0 CreDtaVct.ForeColor = RGB(255,0,0) Else CreDtaVct.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) EndIf if CreSts <> Status_duplicata.CANCELADA &IsMarcado = true Else &IsMarcado = true Endif EndEvent Event &OrderedBy.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_GridColumnsSelector.OnColumnsChanged /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelectorXML = DDO_GridColumnsSelector.ColumnsSelectorValues &ColumnsSelector.FromJson(&ColumnsSelectorXML) SaveColumnsSelectorState(!'WWDuplicatasColumnsSelector', &ColumnsSelector.ToXml()) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &ActionG.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &ActionG = 1 Do 'Do AddPgto' Case &ActionG = 2 Do 'Do AddObs' Case &ActionG = 3 Do 'Do Email' Case &ActionG = 4 Do 'Do Cancelar' Case &ActionG = 5 Do 'Do RegistroOnline' Case &ActionG = 6 Do 'Do Impressaoonline' Case &ActionG = 7 Do 'Do ComandoIntrucao' Case &ActionG = 8 Do 'Do LogAlteracao' Case &ActionG = 9 Do 'Do Renegociacao' Case &ActionG = 10 Do 'Do ImprimirDuplicata' Case &ActionG = 11 Do 'Do RecuperarCob' EndCase &ActionG = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoUserInsert' addDuplicatas.Link('WWDUPLICATAS', 'INS', 0,0,0) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ddo_Expp.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case ddo_Expp.ActiveEventKey = !'ImprimirSelecionadas' Do 'Do ImprimirSelecionadas' Case ddo_Expp.ActiveEventKey = !'espaco2' Do 'Do espaco2' Case ddo_Expp.ActiveEventKey = !'Export' Do 'DoExport' Case ddo_Expp.ActiveEventKey = !'ExportReport' Do 'DoExportReport' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoAjuda' // // &Window.Url = 'https://ajuda.jaspi.com.br/index.aspx?25a822d6-128e-4ff4-a11f-4591c74dfa36' // &Window.Open() // // // RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = 'https://ajuda.jaspi.com.br/index.aspx?25a822d6-128e-4ff4-a11f-4591c74dfa36' // RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) innewWindow.Target = 'https://ajuda.jaspi.com.br/index.aspx?25a822d6-128e-4ff4-a11f-4591c74dfa36' inNewWindow.Name = '_blank' innewWindow.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'InitializeColumnsSelector' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelector = new WWPColumnsSelector() WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&IsMarcado", '', !'', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&CreNovCliRaz", '', !'Cliente', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CreDupNro", '', !'Nro', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CreDtaEms", '', !'Emissão', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CreDtaVct", '', !'Vcto.', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CreDtaPrmPag", '', !'1ºPgto', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CreVlrDup", '', !'Valor', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CreVlrSdo", '', !'Saldo', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CreVenCod", '', !'Vend.', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CreCbrCod", '', !'L.C.', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CreBloNro", '', !'Bloqueto', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"CreFrpPgtoNom", '', !'Forma', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&AuxPedido", '', !'Origem', True, '') &UserCustomValue = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(!'WWDuplicatasColumnsSelector') If not(&UserCustomValue.IsEmpty()) &ColumnsSelectorAux.FromXml(&UserCustomValue) WWP_ColumnSelector_UpdateColumns(&ColumnsSelectorAux, &ColumnsSelector) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CreDupNro1.Visible = False &CreBloNro1.Visible = False &CreCbrCod1.Visible = False &CreCbrNom1.Visible = False &CreVenCod1.Visible = False &CreVlrDup1.Visible = False &CreSerItmCod1.Visible = False &CreFrpPgtoTip1.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREBLONRO' &CreBloNro1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECBRCOD' &CreCbrCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECBRNOM' &CreCbrNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREVENCOD' &CreVenCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREVLRDUP' &CreVlrDup1.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRESERITMCOD' &CreSerItmCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREFRPPGTOTIP' &CreFrpPgtoTip1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CreDupNro2.Visible = False &CreBloNro2.Visible = False &CreCbrCod2.Visible = False &CreCbrNom2.Visible = False &CreVenCod2.Visible = False &CreVlrDup2.Visible = False &CreSerItmCod2.Visible = False &CreFrpPgtoTip2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREBLONRO' &CreBloNro2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRECBRCOD' &CreCbrCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRECBRNOM' &CreCbrNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREVENCOD' &CreVenCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREVLRDUP' &CreVlrDup2.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRESERITMCOD' &CreSerItmCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREFRPPGTOTIP' &CreFrpPgtoTip2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CreDupNro3.Visible = False &CreBloNro3.Visible = False &CreCbrCod3.Visible = False &CreCbrNom3.Visible = False &CreVenCod3.Visible = False &CreVlrDup3.Visible = False &CreSerItmCod3.Visible = False &CreFrpPgtoTip3.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREBLONRO' &CreBloNro3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRECBRCOD' &CreCbrCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRECBRNOM' &CreCbrNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREVENCOD' &CreVenCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREVLRDUP' &CreVlrDup3.Visible = True &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRESERITMCOD' &CreSerItmCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREFRPPGTOTIP' &CreFrpPgtoTip3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AddPgto' If CreSts = Status_Duplicata.CANCELADA msg('ATENÇÃO! Duplicata cancelada verifique!') Else wwduplicataPagamentos.link(EmpCod,FilCod,CreCod) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AddObs' wwduplicataObs.Popup('WWDUPLICATAS', EmpCod,FilCod,CreCod, 0) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Email' If CreSts <> Status_Duplicata.CANCELADA &sdtBoleto.Clear() &sdtBoletoItem = new() &sdtBoletoItem.CreEmpCod = EmpCod &sdtBoletoItem.CreFilCod = FilCod &sdtBoletoItem.CreCod = CreCod &sdtBoleto.Add(&sdtBoletoItem) GerarBoleto.call(&sdtBoleto, true, &IsErro, &newSdtBoleto) if &IsErro = false &WebSession.Set('wpEnviaBoleto', &sdtBoleto.Toxml()) wpEnviaBoleto.Popup() EndIF EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Cancelar' //do CAncelar Duplicata Pedido Do CAse CAse CrePedCod <> 0 &FechaFinanceirAutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('VENDAFECHAFINANCEIRO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &FechaFinanceirAutNiv > 0 FechaFinanceiroPedidoVenda.Call('WWDUPLICATAS', EmpCod, FilCod, CrePedCod, false) Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Fechar Financeiro Pedido Venda. [VENDAFECHAFINANCEIRO]') EndIF CAse CreFrtCod <> 0 //cancela frete wpCancelaFrete.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, CreFrtCod) Refresh Case CreRenDstCod > 0 wpCancelarRenegociacaoReceber.Popup(EmpCod, CreRenDstCod) Refresh Otherwise //do CAncelar Duplicata manual retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWDUPLICATAS', Status_SimNao.Nao, 3, &AutNiv) If &AutNiv >= 3 wpConfirmaCancelarDuplicata.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod) Refresh Else msg('Usuário não autorizado a cancelar duplicata necessário nível 3 - WWDUPLICATAS') EndIf EndCAse /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do RegistroOnline' &Mensagem = '' //Alterações aqui devem ser replicadas em 'RegistraTodosBoletos' Do case Case CreCbrCtaBanBanCod = '748' and CreCbrTipBol <> tipoBoleto.Hibrido // Sicredi Tradicional GeraBoletoApiECommerce.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod, &IsErro, &Mensagem) Case CreCbrCtaBanBanCod = '748' and CreCbrTipBol = tipoBoleto.Hibrido // Sicredi Hibrido GeraBoletoSicredi.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod, &IsErro, &Mensagem) case CreCbrCtaBanBanCod = '237' And CreCbrTipBol <> tipoBoleto.Hibrido//Bradesco GeraBoletoBradesco.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod, &IsErro, &Mensagem) Case CreCbrCtaBanBanCod = '237' And CreCbrTipBol = tipoBoleto.Hibrido geraBoletoHibridoBradesco.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, &Context.PesCod, CreCod, &IsErro, &Mensagem) case CreCbrCtaBanBanCod = '999' //JASPI PAGAMENTOS ZOOP if CreDtaRet.IsEmpty() or CreDtaRet.IsNull() ValidaCliente.call(EmpCod, FilCod, CreCliCod, &IsErro, &Mensagem) if &IsErro = false GeraBoletoApi_ZoopCliente.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, CreCliCod, &IsErro, &Mensagem) Endif if &IsErro = false GeraBoletoApi_ZoopDuplicata.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod, &IsErro, &Mensagem) Refresh Else msg(&Mensagem) EndIf Else Refresh msg('Boleto já registrado. Já possui data de retorno!') Endif Case CreCbrCtaBanBanCod = '077' //INTER if CreCodSol.IsEmpty() or CreCodSol.IsNull() prcGeraBoletoInter.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod,&PesCod, &IsErro, &Mensagem) refresh Else Refresh msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Atenção!", "Boleto já registrado." ,DVMessageType.regular, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"") ) Endif Case CreCbrCtaBanBanCod = '133' if CreDtaRet.IsEmpty() or CreDtaRet.IsNull() prcGeraBoletoCresol.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod, &IsErro, &Mensagem) If &IsErro = False msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Sucesso!", "O sistema obteve êxito em registrar o boleto." ,DVMessageType.success, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"") ) Else msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Atenção!", &Mensagem ,DVMessageType.regular, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) &Mensagem.SetEmpty() EndIf Else msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Atenção!", 'Boleto já possui retorno.' ,DVMessageType.regular, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"")) EndIf Refresh EndCase if not &Mensagem.IsEmpty() msg(&Mensagem) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Impressaoonline' Do Case CAse CreCbrCtaBanBanCod = '748' //Sicredi ImpressaoBoletoApiECommerce.call(EmpCod,CreCod,CreCbrCod,'','','',CreBloNro,'') case CreCbrCtaBanBanCod = '999' //JASPI PAGAMENTOS ZOOP ImpressaoBoletoApi_Zoop.call(EmpCod,FilCod, CreCod, &Mensagem) &Window.Url = &Mensagem &Window.Width = 1200 &Window.Height = 800 &Window.Open() EndCAse /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ComandoIntrucao' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpComandarInstrucaoZoop.PopUp(EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod, CreCbrCtaBanBanCod, CreCbrTipBol) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do LogAlteracao' &AuditRecordKeyValue = trim(str(EmpCod)) + ', ' + trim(str(FilCod)) + ', ' + trim(str(CreCod)) wwLogAlteracoes.Popup(&AuditRecordKeyValue, 'DUPLICATAS') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Renegociacao' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpDuplicataRenegociada.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ImprimirDuplicata' &sdtDuplicata.Clear() &sdtDuplicatasItem.EmpCod = EmpCod &sdtDuplicatasItem.CreCod = CreCod &sdtDuplicatasItem.FilCod = FilCod &sdtDuplicata.Add(&sdtDuplicatasItem) &webSession.Set('IMPRIMEDUPLICATA',&sdtDuplicata.ToXml()) GravaSessaoWpTipoImpressao.Call('DUPLICATA',EmpCod,FilCod,CreCod,0,0,&Random,'','') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpTipoImpressao.PopUp() Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do RecuperarCob' prcAtualizaRetornoInter.Call(&EmpCod, &Context.PesCod) Refresh // &CreCbrCtaBanCrt = trim(CreCbrCtaBanCrt)+trim(CreCbrCtaBanCrtDig) // prcRecuperarCobranca_Inter.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, &PesCod, CreCbrCod, CreCbrChaTra, &CreCbrCtaBanCrt, CreCodSol, &RecuperarMensagem, &SdtRecuperarCobranca_Inter) // If &RecuperarMensagem.IsEmpty() // prcAtualizaDadosRetorno_Inter.Call(EmpCod, CreCod, &SdtRecuperarCobranca_Inter) // If &SdtRecuperarCobranca_Inter.boleto.nossoNumero.Trim().IsEmpty() // msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Atenção!", "EM REMESSA! Boleto INTER registrado porém sem retorno recupere a cobrança." ,DVMessageType.regular, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"") ) // Else // msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"SUCESSO!", "Sucesso! Boleto INTER registrado com sucesso." ,DVMessageType.success, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"") ) // EndIf // Else // msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"ERRO!", "ERRO ao Recuperar Cobrança!" ,DVMessageType.error, "", DVMessageBoolean.True,"") ) // EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ImprimirSelecionadas' &sdtGerarBoleto.Clear() prcAtualizaRetornoInter.Call(&EmpCod, &Context.PesCod) for Each line in grid If CreSts <> Status_Duplicata.CANCELADA and &IsMarcado = true if (CreCbrImp = TipoImpressao.GerarBoleto or (CreCbrImp = TipoImpressao.ImprimirBoleto and CreBloNro <> '')) and CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DUPLICATA &sdtGerarBoletoItem = new() &sdtGerarBoletoItem.CreCod = CreCod &sdtGerarBoletoItem.CreFilCod = FilCod &sdtGerarBoletoItem.CreEmpCod = EmpCod &sdtGerarBoleto.Add(&sdtGerarBoletoItem) Endif Endif EndFor if &sdtGerarBoleto.Count > 0 GerarBoleto.Call(&sdtGerarBoleto, true, &IsErro, &newSdtBoleto) If &IsErro = false RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS045.Link(EmpCod, FilCod, &Random) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) EndIF else msg('Nenhuma duplicata para ser impressa!') Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do espaco2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRERECPAG" &CreRecPag.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRECOD" &CreCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CREPEDCOD" &CrePedCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRECLICOD" &CreCliCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRECLIRAZ" &CreCliRaz.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CREVLRSDO" &CreVlrSdo.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRESTS" &CreSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"AUXCREFRPPGTOTIP" &auxCreFrpPgtoTip.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CREDTAVCT" &CreDtaVct.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &CreDtaVct_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator2.Visible = False &DynamicFiltersOperator3.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREBLONRO' &CreBloNro1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECBRCOD' &CreCbrCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECBRNOM' &CreCbrNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREVENCOD' &CreVenCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREVLRDUP' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &CreVlrDup1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRESERITMCOD' &CreSerItmCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREFRPPGTOTIP' &CreFrpPgtoTip1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CRERECPAG", "", not &CreRecPag.IsEmpty(), 0, &CreRecPag, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CRECOD", "", not &CreCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &CreCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CREPEDCOD", "", not &CrePedCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &CrePedCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CRECLICOD", "", not &CreCliCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &CreCliCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CRECLIRAZ", "", not &CreCliRaz.IsEmpty(), 0, &CreCliRaz, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CREVLRSDO", "", not &CreVlrSdo.IsEmpty(), 0, &CreVlrSdo.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CRESTS", "", not &CreSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &CreSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"AUXCREFRPPGTOTIP", "", not &auxCreFrpPgtoTip.IsEmpty(), 0, &auxCreFrpPgtoTip, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CREDTAVCT", "", not (&CreDtaVct.IsEmpty() AND &CreDtaVct_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &CreDtaVct.ToString().Trim(), &CreDtaVct_To.ToString().Trim()) Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREDUPNRO' AND not &CreDupNro1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreDupNro1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREBLONRO' AND not &CreBloNro1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreBloNro1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECBRCOD' AND not &CreCbrCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCbrCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECBRNOM' AND not &CreCbrNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCbrNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREVENCOD' AND not &CreVenCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreVenCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREVLRDUP' AND not &CreVlrDup1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreVlrDup1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator1 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRESERITMCOD' AND not &CreSerItmCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreSerItmCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREFRPPGTOTIP' AND not &CreFrpPgtoTip1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreFrpPgtoTip1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREDUPNRO' AND not &CreDupNro2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreDupNro2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREBLONRO' AND not &CreBloNro2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreBloNro2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRECBRCOD' AND not &CreCbrCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCbrCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRECBRNOM' AND not &CreCbrNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCbrNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREVENCOD' AND not &CreVenCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreVenCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREVLRDUP' AND not &CreVlrDup2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreVlrDup2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator2 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRESERITMCOD' AND not &CreSerItmCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreSerItmCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREFRPPGTOTIP' AND not &CreFrpPgtoTip2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreFrpPgtoTip2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREDUPNRO' AND not &CreDupNro3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreDupNro3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREBLONRO' AND not &CreBloNro3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreBloNro3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRECBRCOD' AND not &CreCbrCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCbrCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRECBRNOM' AND not &CreCbrNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCbrNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREVENCOD' AND not &CreVenCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreVenCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREVLRDUP' AND not &CreVlrDup3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreVlrDup3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator = &DynamicFiltersOperator3 Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRESERITMCOD' AND not &CreSerItmCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreSerItmCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREFRPPGTOTIP' AND not &CreFrpPgtoTip3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreFrpPgtoTip3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Duplicatas" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'DoExport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate Excel spreadsheet and download it. Do 'LoadGridState' ExportWWDuplicatas.Call(&ExcelFilename, &ErrorMessage) If (&ExcelFilename <> "") Link(&ExcelFilename) Else msg(&ErrorMessage) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'DoExportReport' if 1 = 2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate PDF file. Do 'LoadGridState' InNewWindow1.Target = ExportReportWWDuplicatas.Link() InNewWindow1.Height = !'600' InNewWindow1.Width = !'800' InNewWindow1.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ else Do case case &Status_AbertoFechado = 'P' //Pagas &Status = 'P' case &Status_AbertoFechado = 'A' //Abertas &Status = 'A' otherwise //Todas &Status = 'T' EndCase Do 'LoadGridState' InNewWindow1.Target = RelatorioMonitoraDuplicatas_Total_PDF.Link(&Status, &IsCancelado) InNewWindow1.Height = !'600' InNewWindow1.Width = !'800' InNewWindow1.OpenWindow() EndIf EndSub Event &CreCod.IsValid do 'GravaFiltros' EndEvent Event &CreRecPag.IsValid do 'GravaFiltros' EndEvent Event &CreCliCod.IsValid do 'GravaFiltros' EndEvent Event &CrePedCod.IsValid do 'GravaFiltros' EndEvent Event &Status_AbertoFechado.IsValid do 'GravaFiltros' EndEvent Event 'Prompt' 4 PromptCliente.Popup(&EmpCod,&CreCliCod) EndEvent Event &IsCancelado.Click Grid.Refresh() EndEvent Event &DoImprimir.Click prcAtualizaRetornoInter.Call(&EmpCod, &Context.PesCod) If CreSts = Status_Duplicata.CANCELADA msg('ATENÇÃO! Duplicata cancelada verifique!') Else Do case Case CreCbrImp = TipoImpressao.GerarBoleto and CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DUPLICATA &sdtGerarBoleto.Clear() &sdtGerarBoletoItem.CreCod = CreCod &sdtGerarBoletoItem.CreFilCod = FilCod &sdtGerarBoletoItem.CreEmpCod = EmpCod &sdtGerarBoleto.Add(&sdtGerarBoletoItem) GerarBoleto.Call(&sdtGerarBoleto, true, &IsErro, &newSdtBoleto) If &IsErro = false RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS045.Link(EmpCod, FilCod, &Random) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) EndIF Case CreCbrImp = TipoImpressao.ImprimirBoleto and CreBloNro <> '' and CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DUPLICATA //BANCO ENVIA AND COM REGISTRO &sdtGerarBoleto.Clear() &sdtGerarBoletoItem.CreCod = CreCod &sdtGerarBoletoItem.CreFilCod = FilCod &sdtGerarBoletoItem.CreEmpCod = EmpCod &sdtGerarBoleto.Add(&sdtGerarBoletoItem) GerarBoleto.Call(&sdtGerarBoleto, true, &IsErro, &newSdtBoleto) If &IsErro = false RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS045.Link(EmpCod, FilCod, &Random) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) EndIF Case CreCbrImp = TipoImpressao.ImprimirDuplicata and CreFrpPgtoTip = TipoDuplicata.DUPLICATA &sdtDuplicata.Clear() &sdtDuplicatasItem.EmpCod = EmpCod &sdtDuplicatasItem.CreCod = CreCod &sdtDuplicatasItem.FilCod = FilCod &sdtDuplicata.Add(&sdtDuplicatasItem) &webSession.Set('IMPRIMEDUPLICATA',&sdtDuplicata.ToXml()) RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS019.link(EmpCod,FilCod, &Random) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) Case CreCbrImp = TipoImpressao.NaoFazerNada Msg('ATENÇÃO! Tipo de impressão no local de cobrança selecionado como "NADA A FAZER", altere o tipo de impressão caso necessário.') EndCase EndIf EndEvent Sub 'GravaFiltros' &PadObs = PadL(str(&CrePedCod),8,'0') &PadObs += PadL(str(&CreCliCod),8,'0') Do Case Case &CreRecPag = ReceberPagar.Receber &PadObs += '1' case &CreRecPag = ReceberPagar.Pagar &PadObs += '2' OtherWise &PadObs += '3' EndCase &PadObs += PadL(str(&CreCod),8,'0') &PadObs += &Status_AbertoFechado PadraoUsuario.Call('G',&Pgmname, &Context.PesCod,&Context.EmpCod,&PadObs,&PadDtaMod) EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
